title: How to create agents that people actually want to use
author: Phoebe Sajor
text:
monday.com is a work management platform that allows you to plan and execute work across departments with a unified, AI-first product suite.
Connect with Assaf on LinkedIn and Twitter.
Congrats to Populist badge winner Vilx-, who received the badge for their answer to How do you provide a default type for generics?.
